title: ChatGPT
description:
Conversational AI model developed by OpenAI.
Ideal for text generation, coding, and brainstorming.

title: Claude AI
description:
Next-generation AI assistant built by Anthropic.
Excels at long-context reasoning and nuanced writing.

title: GitHub Copilot
description:
AI-powered pair programmer for developers.
Offers real-time code completions inside your IDE.

title: Midjourney
description:
Generative AI service for high-quality imagery.
Produces photorealistic and artistic visual renders.

title: Perplexity AI
description:
AI-driven search engine providing cited answers.
Combines real-time web search with conversational AI.

title: Hugging Face
description:
Platform for sharing machine learning models.
Host to thousands of open-source AI datasets and tools.

title: Grammarly
description:
AI communication assistant for writing.
Improves grammar, clarity, tone, and vocabulary.

title: Notion AI
description:
Integrated workspace assistant for notes and docs.
Summarizes notes, drafts content, and manages tasks.

title: Jasper AI
description:
AI copilot tailored for enterprise marketing.
Generates brand-aligned content and copy at scale.

title: Canva Magic Studio
description:
Suite of AI tools built directly into Canva.
Generates visuals, edits photos, and writes design copy.
